context7.description: Real-time library documentation — always use before generating code that touches any npm/PyPI/crate dependency

github.description: GitHub MCP — issues, PRs, repos. Token auto-set from gh auth.

perplexity-sonar.description: Web search for CVEs, changelogs, security advisories. Default sonar-pro. Override per-call: sonar (fast), sonar-reasoning (/deliberate only).
